TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Greenskin Tribes Faction.

Translations.Comment: Greenskin essence. 'Pelleverde' combines 'pelle' (skin) and 'verde' (green) to convey fantasy tone.
Brutal warriors. Direct and forceful translation maintaining orc warrior aesthetic.
Savage strength. 'Brutali' conveys thuggish, aggressive nature of elite orc troops.
Chaotic horde. 'Frotta' emphasizes disorganized, swarming nature of goblin forces.
Spear horde. 'Lancieri' clarifies weapon specialty while maintaining chaotic horde essence.
Savage mounted troops. 'Cinghiale' (wild boar) creates appropriately warlike unit name.
Predatory cavalry. Combines mounted warriors with wolf mounts for fast, aggressive unit.

Translations.Translation: Carro da Guerra Orchesco di Cinghiale
Translations.Comment: Epic war machine. Emphasizes military might and imposing scale of chariot unit.
Ranged troops. Clearly identifies these as archers with shortbows.
Artillery unit. Captures crossbow bolt-throwing nature of ranged siege weapon.
Stone artillery. Straightforward designation consistent with fantasy wargaming.
Classic creature. Universally recognized fantasy creature in Italian contexts.
Colossal monster. Powerful term fitting mythical epic scale of wargame.
Winged dragon-beast. Traditional Italian term for wyvern in fantasy.
Monstrous creature. Combines spider with size to create appropriately fearsome designation.
Tribal leader. Conveys military leadership and authority of legendary commander.
Magical practitioner. 'Sciamano' captures tribal mysticism of goblin spellcasters.
Faction leader. Grand title conveying both goblin nature and royal authority.
